name: Crayola Mini Twistables Crayons for Kids (50ct), Cute Back to School Supplies for Kids, Crayons for Coloring Books, Gift for Toddlers Girls & Boys, Arts & Crafts, 3+
bullets: CRAYOLA TWISTABLES CRAYON SET: This kids' coloring set includes 50 Crayola Mini Twistable Crayons, perfect for little hands.
VALENTINES DAY CARD MAKING SUPPLIES: Add them to a classroom card‑making station, bundle them with craft paper and stickers, or create heartfelt handmade valentines.
LESS MESS COLORING: Unlike traditional crayons, Crayola Twistable Crayons require no peeling or sharpening, making them a great less-mess option for coloring.
DURABLE AND LONG-LASTING: Made with high-quality materials, these crayons for toddlers and kids are built to last.
ARTS & CRAFTS SUPPLIES FOR KIDS: The less-mess design of Crayola Twistables Crayons makes them a great addition to kids' crafting supplies, encouraging creativity and fun in classrooms and at home.
PORTABLE AND CONVENIENT: The compact size and durable case make these crayons easy to take along, perfect for travel and creative activities on the go.
description: Discover a whirlwind of color with the Crayola Twistables Crayon Set, packed with 50 Mini Twistable Crayons that are just the right size for little hands. Kids can choose from 50 brilliant hues that provide the same magic as classic Crayola colors, but without the fuss of peeling and sharpening. The twist-up barrels offer a less-mess artistic experience, making coloring more enjoyable. Designed to delight, this compact Twistables Crayon Set comes with a sturdy case, allowing on-the-go artists to take their creativity wherever they please. reviews.name: Ashley t whitman
reviews.title: Great product.
reviews.body: Love these, I like that they are not easy to break.

reviews.name: D. M. Castelvetrano
reviews.title: NO COLOR CRAYONS
reviews.body: NO COLOR comes out of these crayons! Had to contact Crayola to exchange for different item!

reviews.name: Anonymous
reviews.title: Perfect size for toddlers!
reviews.body: Wonderful for toddlers tiny hands! Twistables are easily portable, not easily broken like regular crayons. Great gift for children! Blends well, easy to clean off tables.

reviews.name: Jennifer S.
reviews.title: Great alternative to wax crayons!
reviews.body: Purchased for my grandsons, ages 3 and 4. Twistables are such a better choice than standard crayons, in my opinion as they never need sharpening, are cleaner, and cannot easily break! My 4 year old grandson is really getting into art and learning how to draw, so I bought him a "how to draw" book and these. He LOVES them and as you can see is using them to be very creative as he learns how to draw…
